sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8599" key="a)nh/domai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνήδομαι</orth>, <sense id="n8599.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">renounce one's enjoyment of</tr_> a thing, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">no longer enjoy</tr_> it, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἃ τόθ᾽ ἥτθην, ταῦτα νῦν ἀ.</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:77" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">77</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
